results.title: Sr Manager, Insights & Analytics - Digital Marketing - (HYBRID-ACTON, MA OR SAN DIEGO, CA) job in Acton, MA, United States at Insulet Corporation
highlights:
Sr Manager, Insights & Analytics - Digital Marketing - (HYBRID-ACTON, MA OR SAN DIEGO, CA) job in Acton, MA, United States at Insulet Corporation
...
Sr Manager, Insights & Analytics - Digital Marketing - (HYBRID-ACTON, MA OR SAN DIEGO, CA)
...
The Senior Manager, Insights & Analytics - Digital Marketing at Insulet Corporation will play a crucial role in driving digital marketing strategies for the Omnipod® System across European markets. This position is responsible for implementing regional strategies and supporting local EU Marketing Managers in executing digitally focused commercial plans aimed at raising awareness and educating both people living with diabetes and their caregivers. The Senior Manager will lead the development of comprehensive digital strategies and tactical activities, ensuring consistent execution in collaboration with cross-functional and cross-border teams. Key responsibilities include managing digital advertising campaigns, driving the implementation of a portfolio of digital marketing programs to enhance customer acquisition, conversion, and retention, and establishing performance metrics for consumer marketing initiatives. This role also involves collaborating with country teams to support existing educational efforts and identifying new opportunities for growth. By sharing successes with the global marketing organization and translating EU marketing achievements for a wider audience, the Senior Manager will contribute to the overall success of digital initiatives. Furthermore, this position requires close collaboration with regulatory, clinical, medical education, and legal/compliance teams to streamline digital processes and develop ongoing market intelligence to inform business planning and strategies for growth in the EU.
...
We are seeking an experienced and strategic Senior Manager, Insights & Analytics - Digital Marketing to join our team. This individual will work in implementing and evaluating initiatives across digital advertising channels, establishing global best practices and partnering with global marketing teams. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in digital marketing, particularly within regulated businesses that require balancing compliance with effective marketing.
...
You will oversee global performance marketing programs, collaborating with direct-to-consumer and healthcare provider teams and supporting agencies. They will lead efforts to improve data quality, streamline attribution, and deliver actionable insights that support media investment strategies and funnel optimization.
...
This role is pivotal in shaping our digital roadmap, ensuring alignment with business goals, and fostering innovation across paid digital channels. They will be focused on our product marketing and lead to acquisition funnel, and will come with a blend of analytical, technical, strategic and interpersonal skills to effectively manage and enhance Insulet’s performance marketing programs and drive business growth.
...
- Champion and enable increased adoption of data-driven decision-making for digital marketing tactics, driving marketing campaign optimization process and daily management activities to ensure continuous improvement of campaign performance.
...
- Working with Digital Marketing Agency and Website Analytics Manager, drive the creation of Global Digital Dashboards to provide visualizations of website performance, conversion analytics, ad performance, and customer insights.
...
- Conduct thorough and continuous market research and competitive analysis to identify emerging trends, opportunities, and threats in the digital landscape.
...
- Stay abreast of the latest digital marketing trends and technologies, incorporating innovative approaches to enhance marketing effectiveness.
...
- Advanced knowledge of digital marketing platforms and tools, including both strategic and executional experience at multiple points of the acquisition funnel.

results.title: Insulet Corporation AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Insulet Corporation is a leader in automated insulin delivery technology, known for its tubeless Omnipod Insulin Management System that has achieved market-leading positions in both type 1 and type 2 diabetes care[1]. The company has demonstrated strong financial performance with 2024 revenue exceeding $2.1 billion, representing 22% year-over-year growth[2]. Insulet's flagship Omnipod 5 Automated Insulin Delivery System integrates with continuous glucose monitors to provide personalized, automated insulin delivery and has become the most-prescribed AID system in the U.S.[3]. The company is leveraging AI across multiple dimensions, including enhancing product algorithms, improving customer experience through predictive analytics, and optimizing internal operations with tools like Microsoft CoPilot and Google Gemini[4].

results.title: Lead Medical Affairs Specialist, Real World Evidence & Biostatistics (Hybrid - San Diego, CA) | Hirevector
highlights:
# Lead Medical Affairs Specialist, Real World Evidence & Biostatistics (Hybrid - San Diego, CA)
...
The Lead Medical Affairs Specialist, Real World Evidence (RWE) and Biostatistics is responsible for leading the design, execution, and interpretation of RWE studies supporting Omnipod products. This role is highly technical and centers on applying advanced statistical methodologies to analyze clinical, claims, and real-world datasets. The incumbent will contribute to the development of study protocols and statistical analysis plans, perform complex statistical modeling, and ensure analytical rigor across all evidence generation activities. Collaboration with internal teams such as Data Science, Regulatory Affairs, and R&D is essential to ensure alignment with regulatory standards and scientific best practices. Success in this role requires deep expertise in biostatistics, proficiency in statistical programming tools (e.g., R, SAS, Python, SQL), and a strong understanding of observational research methods. The ability to manage large datasets, conduct exploratory and confirmatory analyses, and communicate technical findings clearly is critical.
...
- Execute the global RWE strategy supporting Insulet’s product portfolio and product development activities, supporting product lifecycle management and innovation initiatives
...
- Design and conduct advanced statistical analyses for clinical studies, RWE, and medical/pharmacy claims-based research, ensuring methodological rigor and regulatory compliance.
...
- Develop and review study documentation, including protocols, statistical analysis plans (SAPs), and mock-up displays for tables, listings, and figures.
...
- Manage and analyze large, diverse datasets; perform exploratory and confirmatory analyses, hypothesis testing, and statistical modeling.
...
validation and claims substantiation.
...
- Partner with data science teams to leverage real-world databases and generate high-impact insights.
...
- Proven experience leading complex research projects in industry, academia, or CRO settings.
...
- Deep understanding of real-world data sources (e.g., medical/pharmacy claims, electronic medical records, registries) and their application in observational research, with hands-on experience analyzing large U.S. claims datasets (commercial, Medicare, Medicaid).
...
- Expertise in epidemiologic methods and statistical modeling.
...
- Proficiency in statistical software (e.g., R, SAS, Python, SQL) and data visualization tools.
...
- Advanced degree (Master’s or PhD) in biostatistics, epidemiology, public health, or a related quantitative field.
...
- 5 to 8 years of experience in clinical research, real-world evidence, or health economics/outcomes research, within academia or the medical device or biopharma industry (higher education accepted in lieu of some years of experience)

results.title: Manager, Medical Affairs, T2D Segment (Remote) | Careerport
highlights:
# Manager, Medical Affairs, T2D Segment (Remote)
...
Insulet Corporation is an innovative medical device company dedicated to simplifying the lives of people living with diabetes. Founded in 2000 with an idea and a mission to enable our customers to enjoy simplicity, freedom, and healthier lives using our Omnipod® product platform. In the last two decades we have improved the lives of hundreds of thousands of people living with diabetes by using innovative technology that is wearable, waterproof, and lifestyle accommodating. Insulet’s latest innovation, the Omnipod® 5 Automated Insulin Delivery System, is a tubeless automated insulin delivery system, integrated with a continuous glucose monitor to manage blood sugar with no need for daily injections, zero finger sticks, and is fully controlled by a compatible personal smartphone. The Company’s world headquarters and state-of-the-art automated manufacturing facility are located in Acton, Massachusetts with global offices in the U.K., France, Germany, Netherlands, Canada, Mexico, Australia, and the United Arab Emirates. Omnipod products are available in 24 countries around the world.
...
Insulet’s Medical Affairs team adds to our innovation journey by providing medical expertise to the organization to inform research and development, evidence generation and dissemination, professional engagement, and medical education to advance our mission.
...
Reporting to the Director Medical Affairs, Type 2 / Data Products Franchise Lead, this newly created Medical Affairs manager position will be a key contributing member of the cross-functional (Franchise) team to guide and influence the development of robust business plans and strategies that drive the global growth of specific Omnipod initiatives. You will function as the Medical Affairs project lead and have accountabilities for all medical activities related to focused Omnipod projects throughout the full lifecycle (early development through end of life). You will be responsible for providing medical advisory and strategy that drive meaningful, safe, and effective innovation, impactful evidence, and effective knowledge translation to customers to expand the accessibility of Omnipod in current and future markets.
...
- Compensation & Benefits: For U.S.-based positions only, the annual base salary range for this role is $131,400.00 - $197,100.00 This position may also be eligible for incentive compensation. We offer a comprehensive benefits package, including:
...
Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD), headquartered in Massachusetts, is an innovative medical device company dedicated to simplifying life for people with diabetes and other conditions through its Omnipod product platform. The Omnipod Insulin Management System provides a unique alternative to traditional insulin delivery methods. With its simple, wearable design, the tubeless disposable Pod provides up to three days of non-stop insulin delivery, without the need to see or handle a needle. Insulet’s flagship innovation, the Omnipod 5 Automated Insulin Delivery System, integrates with a continuous glucose monitor to manage blood sugar with no multiple daily injections, zero fingersticks, and can be controlled by a compatible personal smartphone in the U.S. or by the Omnipod 5 Controller. Insulet also leverages the unique design of its Pod by tailoring its Omnipod technology platform for the delivery of non-insulin subcutaneous drugs across other therapeutic areas. For more information, please visit insulet.com and omnipod.com.

results.title: Director of Data and Biostatistics (Remote) | Wfh
highlights: accurate interpretation of clinical study data working cross functionally to ensure the needs of the business are met. • Lead the development and execution of statistical analysis plans for clinical studies. • Oversee the design and validation of clinical databases (e.g., EDC systems) and ensure alignment with study protocols and regulatory requirements. • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Clinical Operations, Medical Affairs, Regulatory Affairs, and Quality Assurance. • Ensure high-quality data collection, cleaning, and reporting processes. • Manage data management and biostatistics vendors and CROs, ensuring deliverables are met on time and within budget. • Develop and maintain SOPs and best practices for biostatistics and data management activities. • Provide leadership and mentorship to data management and biostatistics staff. This role will have direct reports. • Performs other duties as required. Education and Experience: • Master's degree in Life Sciences, Health Informatics, Biostatistics or related field. • Minimum of 8-10 years of data management and/or biostatistics experience in clinical research, with at least 3 years in a leadership role. • Strong background in medical device clinical trials and understanding of FDA and ISO regulations (e.g., 21 CFR Part 11, ISO 14155). • Knowledgeable in statistical methods. • Proficiency with clinical data systems (e.g., Medidata Rave, Oracle InForm, REDCap). • Experience with device data integration and analysis. • Solid understanding of database design, data standards (e.g., CDISC), and data quality assurance. • Excellent communication, leadership, and project management skills. Skills/Competencies: • Excellent written and effective verbal communication skills. • Ability to communicate cross-functionally across the organization. • PC skills; word processing, spreadsheet, database, Internet search and utilization. • Flexible and able to work in a fast-paced environment. • Team player. • Ability to organize and judge priorities. • Excellent ability to generate and maintain accurate records. NOTE: This position is eligible for 100% remote working arrangements (may work from home/virtually 100%; may also work hybrid on-site/virtual as desired). #LI-Remote Additional Information: Compensation & Benefits: For U.S.-based positions only, the annual base salary range for this role is $183,225.00 - $274,837.50 This position may also be eligible for incentive compensation. We offer a comprehensive benefits package, including: • Medical, dental, and vision insurance • 401(k) with company match • Paid time off (PTO) • And additional employee wellness programs Application Details: This job posting will remain open until the position is filled. Founded and led Tandem’s Data Science & Analytics organization, building and scaling a multidisciplinary team spanning data science, product analytics, business analytics, simulations, and data infrastructure. Defined and executed enterprise data science and analytics strategy, including prioritization of AI, machine learning, simulation, analytics, and data platform initiatives aligned with product and business objectives. Built and mentored high-performing technical leaders and teams, establishing organizational structures, processes, and operating models that supported innovation, collaboration, accountability, and long-term capability development. Fostered a research-oriented culture grounded in experimentation, rapid learning, evidence-driven decision making, and human-centered innovation. Led development of machine learning models, algorithms, simulations, and analytics products designed to simplify diabetes management and reduce cognitive burden for people using insulin therapy. Partnered cross-functionally with product, UX, clinical, regulatory, engineering, commercial, and executive teams to define and evaluate data- and AI-enabled product opportunities. Built a modern Databricks-based cloud data platform on Azure integrating diverse clinical, operational, device, and behavioral datasets to support analytics, modeling, simulations, and product feedback loops. Established infrastructure and processes for post-market surveillance, real-world evidence generation, and in silico evaluations to support evidence-driven product decisions. Developed analytics and decision-support products used to guide customer retention strategy, pricing decisions, forecasting, healthcare provider engagement, workforce management, and operational planning. Evaluated emerging AI capabilities within regulated healthcare environments, contributing to organizational thinking around responsible adoption, validation requirements, governance considerations, and potential applications.
...

help healthcare providers and people

diabetes optimize therapy and address behavioral challenges.

### Staff Senior Data Scientist - Machine Learning at Dexcom R&D
...
Helped establish Dexcom’s decision-support program focused on using continuous glucose monitoring data to improve diabetes therapy decisions and patient outcomes. Led cross-functional initiatives spanning UX, design, iOS development, algorithms, marketing, and data science to define future product roadmap concepts for intelligent diabetes management systems. Developed therapy optimization and decision-support algorithms for intensive insulin therapy and demonstrated safety and effectiveness through simulations. Managed technical collaborations with academic partners and contributed to frameworks for evaluating external algorithms and emerging technologies. Worked closely with UX teams to conduct user research, define archetypes and journeys, evaluate concepts, and prioritize unmet user needs.

FIG. 9 depicts a flowchart 900 of illustrative steps that may be performed to make such adjustments in exemplary embodiments. At 902, the basal medicament delivery rate adjustment for open loop mode is determined as described above relative to FIGS. 6A-8. At 904, the control application 116, 120 determines what percentage of change has occurred in the basal medicament delivery rate for open loop mode as a result of the adjustment. For example, if the basal medicament amount was adjusted from 0.75 units per hour to 1.00 units per hour for a segment, the percentage of change would be +33% (i.e., +0.25/0.75). results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

# Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery
...
Employer Eli Lilly and Company Location San Francisco, California Start date Jun 15, 2026
...
## Job Details
...
healthcare leader headquartered
...
We are building something unprecedented, an AI foundation that will fundamentally change how drug discovery research is conducted.
...
The Applied Intelligence for Discovery (AI4D) team is a newly formed group within Lilly Research Laboratories that operates at the intersection of scientific delivery and core platform development. AI4D’s mission is to connecting scientists to petabyte-scale data through natural language interfaces, automated analysis workflows, and intelligent search — and to convert early deployments into repeatable system standards and evaluation practices that scale across therapeutic areas.
...
As a Generative AI Engineer, you will design, build, and operate the core AI systems that power this transformation: retrieval-augmented generation over internal scientific documents, text-to-SQL over complex omics databases, agentic workflows that automate multi-step analyses, and the evaluation infrastructure that able the next-generation of medicines for patients.
...
Key Responsibilities
...
Design, build, and optimize RAG pipelines over internal publications, study reports, electronic lab notebooks, and other scientific documents
...
Build hybrid retrieval systems combining vector search with structured metadata, knowledge graphs, and ontology-aware filtering
...
Build and optimize text-to-SQL systems over Lilly’s databases, enabling scientists to query gene expression, proteomics, pathway, and variant data through natural language
...
Develop schema documentation, semantic annotations, and gold-standard question/SQL pairs that bridge how scientists think about data and how it is stored
...
Implement multi-step reasoning approaches (chain-of-thought, self-correction, Reflexion loops) to improve accuracy on complex scientific queries
...
Design agentic AI workflows that chain database queries, bioinformatics tools, literature search, and visualization into automated multi-step scientific analyses
...
Evaluate and integrate emerging orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, custom architectures) for scientific use cases
...
Build evaluation frameworks measuring accuracy, reliability, and scientific validity of AI outputs
...
PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 0-3+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems; MS in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 5+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems
...
Experience building LLM-powered applications, including at least two of: RAG systems, text-to-SQL, agentic workflows, or fine-tuning pipelines
...
Strong software engineering skills in Python with experience building production-grade systems
...
Deep familiarity with the modern LLM ecosystem: embedding models, vector databases, and orchestration frameworks
...
Experience designing evaluation frameworks for LLM systems — systematic approaches to measuring accuracy, detecting hallucinations, and tracking regressions
...
Experience with MLOps/LLMOps tooling: experiment tracking, model registries, prompt versioning, A/B testing for AI systems
...
Knowledge of biomedical ontologies (Gene Ontology, MeSH, ChEBI) or experience integrating domain-specific knowledge into LLM systems

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...

Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

# Informatics and AI engineer, Biotherapeutics
...
At Pfizer, our purpose is to deliver breakthroughs that change patients’ lives. Our cross-functional Data Ecosystem Team is hiring a data and AI engineer to help build and scale an AI-ready data architecture supporting biotherapeutics labs. You will leverage your expertise to design innovative software and agentic AI solutions that help structure and capture Pfizer’s proprietary data, and extract valuable insights from both proprietary and external datasets. You will enable the generation of testable hypotheses across the entire drug discovery value chain.
...
+ Develop, support and implement a modern data platform to enable efficient and scalable correlation and analysis of data for biologic drug modalities.
...
+ Develop of innovative data products and machine learning methods for biologics data together with machine learning experts within Pfizer
...
+ Develop analysis pipelines with appropriate use of agentic AI
...
+ Develop and deploy data products to meet specific needs through data integration
...
+ Implement, test, and validate new methods for data analysis and visualization techniques
...
+ Enhance Pfizer biologics data capture,
...
tagging, and
...
strategy along with Pfizer’s Digital organization
...
+ PhD in Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Statistics or a related technical discipline **OR** Master’s degree and 2+ years of experience building AI powered research applications
...
+ Research experience developing data products and data integration solutions as well as a sincere desire to innovate at the nexus of data science and agentic AI for life sciences
...
+ Experience with LLMs, agentic AI, and MCP/RAG systems
...
+ Expertise in software engineering, package development, cloud architectures, CI/CD, and software engineering tooling
...
+ Nextflow pipeline development
...
+ Hands-on experience handling, processing, integrating, and analyzing large heterogenous data sets data in a drug discovery research environment
...
+ Experience with Claude Code or equivalent and agentic coding paradigms
...
+ Ability to perform complex data analysis.

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
values, identifying outliers
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
